# Startup Files, PATH, and Portable Dotfiles

<!-- STUB (Phase 0). Scope: PLAN.md Section 8, Ch 17. Startup-file order
     (.zshrc / .bashrc / .bash_profile; login vs interactive vs
     noninteractive), remote-shell startup ("works in terminal, fails
     in script/SSH/cron"). + Scheduled/non-interactive contexts: cron
     vs launchd vs CI and why PATH/env differ. Drafted in Phase 6. -->
